summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Hidden Monkey Guest App - hostel guest management system. Backend APIs working well for guest functions, frontend UI loads correctly with full navigation and cart functionality. Found JWT authentication issues and some minor UI concerns.

critical_bugs.issue: Staff login fails with 401 Invalid credentials using admin/admin123
critical_bugs.impact: Staff cannot access admin dashboard and protected features
critical_bugs.details: Default admin credentials appear to be incorrect or not set up properly

critical_bugs.issue: Protected endpoint returns 200 success without JWT token instead of 401
critical_bugs.impact: JWT authentication not properly protecting admin endpoints
critical_bugs.details: Should require Authorization header but accepts unauthenticated requests

working_endpoints.status: ✅ Working - Returns 200 with database connection status
✅ Working - Returns 6 experiences with full data
✅ Working - Returns 12 menu items with categories

ui_bugs.issue: Room number field selector issue - Playwright cannot fill it
ui_bugs.details: Field may not be a proper input element or has accessibility issues

working_features.status: ✅ Loads correctly with property info, modules, and navigation
✅ Shows 6 experiences with categories, images, prices, and descriptions
✅ Shows 12 menu items with working cart functionality
✅ Add to cart, quantity controls, and toast notifications work
✅ All page navigation and back buttons work correctly
✅ Form displays with category selection and text areas

passed_tests: Property info retrieval for guest landing page
Frontend home page loading and display
Frontend experiences page with data display
Frontend food menu with cart functionality

high_priority: Fix staff login credentials - current admin/admin123 returns 401 Invalid credentials
Implement proper JWT authentication protection for admin endpoints like POST /api/property-info
medium_priority: Review and fix room number input field accessibility in requests form
Verify all protected endpoints are properly secured with JWT middleware

success_percentage.backend: 70% (7/10 tests passed - auth issues preventing full success)
success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All major flows working, minor form field issue)
